mapper.select: insert into am_runtime_job (queue_name, spec_version, message_id, message_source, message_type, message_subject, data_content_type, data_json, message_time, available_at) values (#{queueName}, #{specVersion}, #{messageId}, #{messageSource}, #{messageType}, #{messageSubject}, #{dataContentType}, #{dataJson}, coalesce(#{messageTime}, localtimestamp), coalesce(#{availableAt}, localtimestamp)) returning id

update am_runtime_job set status = 'processing', locked_by = #{workerId}, locked_at = localtimestamp, lease_until = localtimestamp + (#{leaseSeconds} * interval '1 second'), attempts = attempts + 1, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = ( select id from am_runtime_job where queue_name = #{queueName} and ( (status = 'pending' and available_at <= localtimestamp) or (status = 'processing' and lease_until <= localtimestamp) ) order by available_at, id for update skip locked limit 1 ) returning id, queue_name, spec_version, message_id, message_source, message_type, message_subject, data_content_type, data_json, message_time, attempts, locked_by, locked_at, lease_until, created_at
mapper.update: update am_runtime_job set status = 'completed', completed_at = localtimestamp, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and locked_by = #{workerId} and status = 'processing' and lease_until > localtimestamp

update am_runtime_job set status = case when attempts >= #{maxAttempts} then 'dead_letter' else 'pending' end, locked_by = null, locked_at = null, lease_until = null, available_at = coalesce(#{nextAvailableAt}, localtimestamp), last_error = #{lastError}, dead_letter_at = case when attempts >= #{maxAttempts} then localtimestamp else null end, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and locked_by = #{workerId} and status = 'processing' and lease_until > localtimestamp

update am_runtime_lock set owner_id = #{ownerId}, locked_until = localtimestamp + (#{leaseSeconds} * interval '1 second'), updated_at = localtimestamp where lock_name = #{lockName} and (locked_until <= localtimestamp or owner_id = #{ownerId})
mapper.insert: insert into am_runtime_lock (lock_name, owner_id, locked_until) values (#{lockName}, #{ownerId}, localtimestamp + (#{leaseSeconds} * interval '1 second')) on conflict (lock_name) do nothing
